strengths: Strong fullstack TypeScript/Node.js and React experience across multiple senior roles
Solid software craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development)
Founder of an open-source platform deployed on Kubernetes, showing architecture ownership
concerns: Senior/Staff-level profile significantly exceeds the entry-level scope of the role
Limited PostgreSQL exposure — primary database experience is MongoDB
Only basic German, while the role requires high on-site presence in a German-speaking context
response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced fullstack engineer whose technical toolkit (TypeScript, Node.js, React, Kubernetes, AWS) aligns well with the stack, and whose craftsmanship orientation matches the team's interest in clean architecture. However, the role is explicitly entry-level, and the candidate's staff/senior trajectory, MongoDB-leaning database background, and basic German create meaningful friction against the position's seniority and on-site context.
